title: Rebel Privateers!
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref}}
{{MagazineArticle
|image=
|title="Rebel Privateers!"
|author=[[Timothy S. O'Brien]]
|illustrator=[[Doug Shuler|Douglas Shuler]]
|editor=
|publisher=[[West End Games]]
|release date=[[May]] [[1994]]<ref name="Parent release date">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]]</ref>
|pages=25

"'''Rebel Privateers!'''" was a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] article published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] and illustrated by [[Doug Shuler|Douglas Shuler]]. It begins with a letter to Moff Gergris, Halthor Sector Command from Governor Thanis, Noonar. What follows is an article about privateers licensed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to rob from Imperial shipping lanes and Imperial-allied companies. 

It was reprinted in [[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]] in [[April]] [[1996]]. The story was later published online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

{{Game-stub}}
